div1.entryFree: Three-piled, set with a thick, rich pile; of first-rate quality: thou art good velvet; thou 'rt a t. piece, Meas. I, 2, 33 (perhaps with a hidden meaning similar to the German dreihärig, or with an allusion to peeled, i. e. stripped of hair). Metaphorically, == superfine, exaggerated: t. hyperboles, LLL V, 2, 407.
